b:T10e0e,<div class="specification">
<p>An experiment was carried out on osmosis in carrot (<em>Daucus carota</em>) root tissue and potato (<em>Solanum tuberosum</em>) tuber tissue. Similar sized pieces of tissue were cut and soaked in different sucrose solutions for 24 hours. The results are shown in the graph below.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the graph, estimate isotonic sucrose solutions for potato tissue and carrot tissue.</p>
<p>Potato:</p>
<p>Carrot:</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest a reason for the difference in the isotonic points for the potato and the carrot tissues.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>From the evidence provided by the graph, evaluate the reliability of these data.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain <strong>one</strong> reason for calculating the percentage change in mass.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>c:T6b4,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>potato: 0.26 mol dm<sup>–3</sup> ✔ <em>Allow a range of 0.22–0.32</em><br/>carrot: 0.50 mol dm<sup>–3</sup> ✔ <em>Allow a range of 0.45–0.55 (Allow 1 max if no units or either unit is omitted)</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>different dissolved solutes/sugars/sucrose/salts/molarities ✔<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>may have been grown in different soils giving their tissues different contents ✔<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>may have been stored under different conditions ✔<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>may be more dehydrated / different water content ✔<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>different types of tissue / different age ✔</p>
<p><em>Do not accept starch</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the data show clear trends<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>a trend line could be drawn through these data<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>there are no outliers ✔</p>
<p>b. the error bars/standard deviations shown<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>the error bars/standard deviations vary with concentration ✔</p>
<p>c. sample size is unknown ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the change in mass indicates whether the tissue has gained/lost water ✔</p>
<p>b. the pieces of tissue will not be the same mass «at the beginning of the experiment» ✔</p>
<p>c. to compare the relative changes in mass ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/1/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","1"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.SL.TZ0.1"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","1-4-membrane-transport"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
